script: PHP for desktop apps? Yeah, you heard that right. Build native desktop interfaces with the language you already know.
Yangweijie UI2 wraps libui-ng through PHP's FFI layer. No web server, no HTTP round trips — direct C bindings with zero overhead.
Fields, dialogs, color pickers, custom widgets like toggles and progress rings. Even an embedded WebView for rich HTML content.
Write pure PHP. A single file, no build step, no JavaScript. The same Composer workflow you already love.
One codebase. macOS, Linux, Windows. Native look and feel on every platform.
